titleStmt.title: SII 8.294: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 294. (A.R. No. 23 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu vaṭakarai virutarāyapayaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭu meṟ
kālṉāṭṭu brahmade yan tiṭṭaikuṭiyāṉa tirucciṟṟampalacaturvedima ṅkalattu tirumeṟkoyi(l) lemperumān Amāvāsi toṟum Eḻuntaruḷa tiruviti tiruppaṇi ceyyum civayuṇṇavarkaḷ per muppa
tinmar Amutuceyyavum Ivvemperumān Inṉāḷā(l) lamutuceytaruḷa Amāvāsi Onṟukku ṉāṉāḻi yariciyāl Oru tirupponakamum cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka veṅkālaṉāṭṭu pukaḻiyūrāṉa nikarilicoḻapurattu viyāpā
ri tiruvālampoḻil kaṇṭan Ivāṭṭai taimāsattu Upaiyamāka vaitta kācu Āyirat torupatukkun kācu Onṟukku Āṭṭaip palicai nellu munṉāḻiyāka vanta nellu muppattoru kalaṉey tūṇip patak kaṟuṉāḻi
nel civayuṇṇavarkaḷ Āṭṭaikkup pon nūṟṟaṟupatukkup per Onṟukku nel kuṟuṇiyāka vanta ṉellu muppatinkalamum Ivemperumāṉukku Amutupaṭi veñcaṉattukku nelluk kalaṉe tūṇip patak kaṟuṉāḻi Āka vippaṭiyāl vanta nellu civayiṇ
ṇavarka(ḷ)ḷukku cāmutāyañ ceyvārākak koṇṭu capaiyaṟiyac caṉtirātittavaṟ cella Ittanmañ celuttuvatu .
Digital edition of SII 8.294 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
